title: Office Dog – “Front Row Seat”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Auckland’s Office Dog formed in 2021. Made up of Kane Strang on vocals and guitar, Rassani Tolovaa on bass, and Mitchell Innes on drums, the indie rock band released their debut album Spiel in 2024. They’ve shared music since then, but today they’re here with “Front Row Seat,” their first new song of the year.…

The post Office Dog – “Front Row Seat” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text: Auckland's Office Dog formed in 2021. Made up of Kane Strang on vocals and guitar, Rassani Tolovaa on bass, and Mitchell Innes on drums, the indie rock band released their debut album Spiel in 2024. They've shared music since then, but today they're here with "Front Row Seat," their first new song of the year. It's an apocalyptic, catchy post-punk tune about feeling numb in the face of daily chaos. Check it out below.
